query: SELECT id, userId, LEFT(token, 20) as token_preview, expiresAt, createdAt FROM passwordResetTokens ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wXRCLsvW1HH1Na.b98aae65f70d --database SPbMst9fYMnn3KTn3JChUH --execute SELECT id, userId, LEFT(token, 20) as token_preview, expiresAt, createdAt FROM passwordResetTokens ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
